category_sources: source_facts.description says Swiss army knife for Pulumi development; source_facts.homepage points to the official pulumi/pulumictl repository.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pulumi/pulumictl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
